scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner missed the $100B+ FY2027 AI revenue guide and OpenAI as 6th hyperscaler XPU customer - requires synthesizing earnings call language, XPU economics, and competitor positioning; scanner data would show large MCap with recent earnings dip and no obvious value flag

Nuclear renaissance thesis requires reading the Paris Nuclear Summit communique (38 nations tripling nuclear by 2050), Russia/Kazakhstan sanctions, and India supply deal simultaneously; scanners see P/E 94x and would filter it as expensive without the structural supply deficit context

Revenue -66.5% looks catastrophic but is a hedging accounting artifact while production grew 25%; scanner would correctly flag negative revenue growth as a red flag but miss that Bob Simpson's 11th consecutive open-market purchase over 6 months is an accumulation signal requiring news synthesis

Dual uranium+REE decoupling thesis requires synthesizing US Rosatom sanctions policy with White Mesa Mill's first commercial-purity heavy rare earth production milestone; scanner sees money-losing micro-cap uranium company and correctly filters it as speculative without the geopolitical context

P/B 1.1x with EUR 16.8B cash creates a structural floor that numeric screens miss because forward earnings are negative; the pipeline option value (25+ Phase 2/3 trials, 6 late-stage readouts in 2026) is invisible to screens that sort on profitability

70%+ TCV growth in AI-led large deals requires reading Q1 earnings call commentary and cross-referencing with CEO language on AI transformation; scanner sees 5.8% revenue growth and low quality metrics; director at $52 June 10 is a Form 4 signal scanners typically lag by days
